{{Infobox group
| name = Golds
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

''See also: [[Golds Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Golds represent a classification of individuals or beings defined by their level of power and advancement. Within this hierarchy, ranks include Lowgolds, Highgolds, and Truegolds, with the latter being particularly powerful individuals who can serve as squad leaders. Some Golds possess unique visual manifestations known as Goldsigns, which can be used for psychological intimidation. In certain contexts, the term also refers to gold [[dragons]], who are described as tyrannical rulers with a history of rivalry against black [[dragons]]. In combat and societal roles, Golds serve various functions. They can act as defenders of cities by channeling [[madra]] into script networks to power weapons and stabilize boundary fields. They also participate in organized fighting, though such conflicts are often fought for territory rather than total extermination. In some instances, Golds have been used as hostages to manipulate manpower or influence political factions. The strength of a [[Gold]] can vary significantly, ranging from students to highly experienced elders or even specialized combatants who excel in rapid, decisive fights.}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The cloudship is crewed by ordinary [[Golds]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Empire]] performs its displays using [[Golds]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] has an escort of [[Golds]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Combat between [[Golds]] is a notable level of combat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Golds]] are a group that can be rallied.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] brought lesser [[Golds]] to help with her siege when she was a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The combat-capable [[Golds]] in [[Moongrave]] channel their [[madra]] into script networks to fuel weapons.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Spiritual perception might mistake [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] for [[Golds]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
